LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS_Midwest.description: The Midwestern 钢铁兄弟会 broke away from the main order during an airship expedition that crash-landed in the Midwest. Unlike their Western counterparts, the Midwestern chapter has adopted a more pragmatic and expansionist philosophy, actively recruiting tribals and wastelanders into their ranks. They maintain the Brotherhood's devotion to technology and military prowess, but have shed much of the isolationism that defines other chapters. Their territory spans vast stretches of the former American Midwest, making them one of the largest and most diverse Brotherhood chapters, though they remain estranged from Lost Hills' authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS_Midwest.ideoDescription: 我们是兄弟会进化而来的。当我们的飞艇在中西部坠毁时，我们了解到生存需要适应。我们招募有价值的人——部落、废土人，甚至以前的敌人——因为力量来自团结，而不是孤立。法典指导我们，但不束缚我们。我们扩张、我们保护、我们忍耐。
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS_Midwest.label: 中西部兄弟会
